summary: Iteration 86: Testing 'Archivio Documentale Aziendale' (Company Document Archive) module at /sistema-qualita. Backend: 13/13 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All critical flows tested successfully - page load, category filtering, search, upload dialog, document upload, delete dialog, document deletion all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement recommended but not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: QualitySystemPage.js has all required data-testid attributes for testing
Backend API at /api/company/documents/ properly handles CRUD operations
File upload validation working - rejects invalid extensions (.exe) and invalid categories
Delete endpoint properly removes file from disk and database
Category filtering uses server-side filtering via query params
Search functionality works across title, tags, and filename
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed documents. 11 documents exist in database across categories.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Sistema Qualita' / 'Archivio Documentale Aziendale' module is fully functional. Page at /sistema-qualita. Key data-testids: quality-system-page, search-docs, btn-upload-doc, category-tabs, tab-all/manuali/procedure/etc, docs-grid, doc-card-{id}, upload-dialog, delete-dialog, btn-confirm-upload, btn-confirm-delete. When testing upload dialog category dropdown, use keyboard navigation (ArrowDown + Enter) to avoid overlay issues with Radix Select component.
